examples.en: My grandparents own a small farm in the countryside.
examples.zh: 我祖父母在鄉下擁有一座小農場。

examples.en: The farm produces rice and vegetables every year.
examples.zh: 這座農場每年生產稻米和蔬菜。

examples.en: The farmer wakes up early to feed the animals.
examples.zh: 農夫很早起床餵動物。

examples.en: Farmers work hard during the harvest season.
examples.zh: 農民在收成季節努力工作。

img: farmer in straw hat holding tools

examples.en: Rice is the main crop in this region.
examples.zh: 稻米是這個地區的主要作物。

examples.en: Heavy rain damaged many crops last month.
examples.zh: 上個月的大雨損害了許多作物。

examples.en: Rich soil helps plants grow faster.
examples.zh: 肥沃的土壤幫助植物長得更快。

examples.en: The farmer tested the soil before planting.
examples.zh: 農夫在種植前檢測了土壤。

examples.en: She planted the seeds in neat rows.
examples.zh: 她把種子種成整齊的一排排。

examples.en: Each seed can grow into a large plant.
examples.zh: 每顆種子都能長成一株大植物。

examples.en: We plant tomatoes in the spring.
examples.zh: 我們在春天種植番茄。

examples.en: They planted trees along the road.
examples.zh: 他們沿著路種了樹。

examples.en: These plants grow well in warm weather.
examples.zh: 這些植物在溫暖的天氣裡長得很好。

examples.en: My uncle grows corn on his land.
examples.zh: 我叔叔在他的地上種玉米。

img: young green plants growing in rows

examples.en: This year's harvest was very good.
examples.zh: 今年的收成非常好。

examples.en: The whole village helps with the harvest.
examples.zh: 整個村莊都幫忙收成。

img: golden wheat field ready for harvest

examples.en: The field is full of yellow flowers.
examples.zh: 田野裡開滿了黃色的花。

examples.en: Cows are grazing in the field.
examples.zh: 牛群在田野裡吃草。

img: wide open green field under sky

examples.en: The horses sleep in the red barn.
examples.zh: 馬兒睡在紅色的穀倉裡。

examples.en: They store hay inside the barn.
examples.zh: 他們把乾草儲存在穀倉裡。

examples.en: The farmer drove the tractor across the field.
examples.zh: 農夫開著拖拉機穿過田地。

examples.en: A tractor makes plowing much easier.
examples.zh: 拖拉機讓犁田輕鬆許多。

examples.en: The farm raises livestock such as cows and pigs.
examples.zh: 這座農場飼養牛和豬等家畜。

examples.en: Clean water is important for healthy livestock.
examples.zh: 乾淨的水對健康的家畜很重要。

examples.en: A large herd of cattle crossed the road.
examples.zh: 一大群牛穿過了馬路。

examples.en: The cattle eat grass in the pasture.
examples.zh: 這些牛在牧場吃草。

examples.en: Chickens and ducks are common poultry on farms.
examples.zh: 雞和鴨是農場常見的家禽。

examples.en: The poultry are kept in a clean coop.
examples.zh: 這些家禽養在乾淨的雞舍裡。

img: chickens and ducks in farm yard

examples.en: Sheep graze quietly on the hillside.
examples.zh: 羊群在山坡上安靜地吃草。

examples.en: The cows graze all day in the field.
examples.zh: 牛群整天在田裡吃草。

examples.en: The horses run freely in the open pasture.
examples.zh: 馬兒在開闊的牧場自由奔跑。

examples.en: Green pasture stretches to the hills.
examples.zh: 綠色的牧草地一直延伸到山邊。

examples.en: A herd of goats climbed the rocky hill.
examples.zh: 一群山羊爬上了岩石山丘。

examples.en: The farmer moved the herd to fresh grass.
examples.zh: 農夫把牧群趕到新鮮的草地。

examples.en: Farmers plow the land before planting.
examples.zh: 農夫在種植前犁田。

examples.en: He plowed the field with an old machine.
examples.zh: 他用一台舊機器犁田。

examples.en: Good irrigation keeps the crops alive in summer.
examples.zh: 良好的灌溉讓作物在夏天存活。

examples.en: The village built a new irrigation system.
examples.zh: 村莊建了一套新的灌溉系統。

examples.en: Farmers add fertilizer to help plants grow.
examples.zh: 農夫加肥料幫助植物生長。

examples.en: Too much fertilizer can harm the soil.
examples.zh: 太多肥料會傷害土壤。

examples.en: She only buys organic vegetables.
examples.zh: 她只買有機蔬菜。

examples.en: Organic farming uses no chemical sprays.
examples.zh: 有機耕作不使用化學噴劑。

examples.en: Tomatoes grow well inside the greenhouse.
examples.zh: 番茄在溫室裡長得很好。

examples.en: The greenhouse stays warm even in winter.
examples.zh: 溫室即使在冬天也很溫暖。

examples.en: We picked apples in the orchard.
examples.zh: 我們在果園裡採蘋果。

examples.en: The orchard is full of ripe peaches.
examples.zh: 果園裡滿是成熟的桃子。

examples.en: The vineyard grows grapes for wine.
examples.zh: 這座葡萄園種植釀酒的葡萄。

examples.en: Rows of vines cover the whole vineyard.
examples.zh: 一排排葡萄藤覆蓋整個葡萄園。

img: rows of grape vines in vineyard

examples.en: Wheat and rice are common grains.
examples.zh: 小麥和稻米是常見的穀物。

examples.en: The grain is stored in large bags.
examples.zh: 穀物儲存在大袋子裡。

examples.en: Bread is made from wheat.
examples.zh: 麵包是用小麥做的。

examples.en: The wheat turns golden in summer.
examples.zh: 小麥在夏天變成金黃色。

examples.en: The farmer grows corn in large fields.
examples.zh: 農夫在大片田地裡種玉米。

examples.en: We picked fresh corn this morning.
examples.zh: 我們今天早上採了新鮮的玉米。

examples.en: They raise horses on a large ranch.
examples.zh: 他們在一座大牧場養馬。

examples.en: The ranch covers hundreds of acres.
examples.zh: 這座牧場占地數百英畝。

examples.en: The dairy farm produces fresh milk daily.
examples.zh: 這座酪農場每天生產新鮮牛奶。

examples.en: Cheese and butter are dairy products.
examples.zh: 起司和奶油是乳製品。

examples.en: The horses eat hay in winter.
examples.zh: 馬兒在冬天吃乾草。

examples.en: Round bales of hay lie in the field.
examples.zh: 圓形的乾草捆躺在田裡。

examples.en: We must pull the weeds from the garden.
examples.zh: 我們必須把花園裡的雜草拔掉。

examples.en: Weeds can steal water from crops.
examples.zh: 雜草會奪走作物的水分。

examples.en: The tomatoes are ripe and ready to pick.
examples.zh: 番茄成熟了,可以採收。

examples.en: Ripe fruit tastes sweet and juicy.
examples.zh: 成熟的水果嚐起來又甜又多汁。

examples.en: The market sells fresh local produce.
examples.zh: 市場販售新鮮的當地農產品。

examples.en: Farm produce is delivered every morning.
examples.zh: 農產品每天早上送達。

examples.en: The farm covers over fifty acres.
examples.zh: 這座農場占地超過五十英畝。

examples.en: They planted rice on ten acres of land.
examples.zh: 他們在十英畝的土地上種稻。

examples.en: Farmers cultivate the land every spring.
examples.zh: 農夫每年春天耕種土地。

examples.en: They cultivate rice and beans together.
examples.zh: 他們同時栽培稻米和豆子。

examples.en: They sow the seeds early in spring.
examples.zh: 他們在早春播種。

examples.en: The farmer sowed wheat across the field.
examples.zh: 農夫在田裡播下小麥種子。

examples.en: Chickens run around the barnyard.
examples.zh: 雞在農家庭院裡跑來跑去。

examples.en: The barnyard was noisy in the morning.
examples.zh: 農家庭院早上很吵鬧。

examples.en: Animal manure makes good natural fertilizer.
examples.zh: 動物糞肥是很好的天然肥料。

examples.en: They spread manure over the field.
examples.zh: 他們把糞肥撒在田裡。

examples.en: The seeds sprout after a few days.
examples.zh: 種子幾天後就發芽。

examples.en: New leaves sprout in the warm sun.
examples.zh: 新葉在溫暖的陽光下發芽。

examples.en: Some farmers avoid using pesticides.
examples.zh: 有些農夫避免使用農藥。

examples.en: Pesticides kill insects that harm crops.
examples.zh: 農藥殺死危害作物的昆蟲。

examples.en: The harvester cuts the wheat quickly.
examples.zh: 收割機很快地割下小麥。

examples.en: A modern harvester saves a lot of time.
examples.zh: 現代收割機節省許多時間。

examples.en: Rich farmland surrounds the small town.
examples.zh: 肥沃的農地環繞著這座小鎮。

examples.en: Much farmland is used to grow rice.
examples.zh: 許多農地用來種植稻米。

examples.en: The shepherd leads the sheep to the hills.
examples.zh: 牧羊人把羊群帶到山上。

examples.en: A shepherd watches the flock all day.
examples.zh: 牧羊人整天看顧羊群。

examples.en: A flock of sheep grazed near the barn.
examples.zh: 一群羊在穀倉附近吃草。

examples.en: The farmer counted his flock each night.
examples.zh: 農夫每晚清點他的羊群。

img: flock of sheep in green field

examples.en: Good weather gave a high crop yield.
examples.zh: 好天氣帶來了高作物產量。

examples.en: The rice yield doubled this year.
examples.zh: 今年的稻米產量翻了一倍。

examples.en: The seedlings need sunlight and water.
examples.zh: 幼苗需要陽光和水。

examples.en: She moved the seedlings into the field.
examples.zh: 她把秧苗移到田裡。

examples.en: Many farmers live in rural areas.
examples.zh: 許多農夫住在農村地區。

examples.en: Life is quiet in the rural village.
examples.zh: 農村小村莊的生活很安靜。

examples.en: Everyone is busy at harvesttime.
examples.zh: 收成期時大家都很忙碌。

examples.en: Harvesttime comes in early autumn.
examples.zh: 收成期在初秋來臨。

examples.en: The scarecrow keeps birds away from the crops.
examples.zh: 稻草人讓鳥兒遠離作物。

examples.en: A tall scarecrow stands in the rice field.
examples.zh: 一個高高的稻草人立在稻田裡。

examples.en: The wheat will be harvestable next week.
examples.zh: 小麥下週就可以收成了。

examples.en: Only ripe crops are harvestable.
examples.zh: 只有成熟的作物才可收成。
